name: Granola
steps: Boil butter, brown sugar, and glucose until sugar melts.
Mix in vanilla and orange zeste.
Mix oats, coconut flakes, almond, and chopped pecan nuts together.
Mix the syrup and dry ingredients all together well.
In a gastronome tray, bake at 175°C for about 20 minutes.
The mix needs to be turned every 5 minutes to cook until it is golden everywhere.
